services.title: Bridal Makeup
services.description: Luxury bridal transformation with premium HD cosmetics, long-lasting matte finish, gold fleck base, and customized brow styling.

services.title: Party Makeup
services.description: High-end glam or classic elegant party makeover complete with dynamic highlighting, defined lining, and custom contouring.

services.title: HD Makeup
services.description: Specialized ultra-defined high definition camera-ready makeup, absolute lightweight look, optimal for photographers and professional shoots.

services.title: Airbrush Makeup
services.description: Flawless, water-resistant silicone mist finish delivering a flawless velvet complexion. Highly-demanded for state-of-the-art events.

services.title: Engagement Makeup
services.description: Sophisticated radiant highlight-rich treatment capturing dynamic freshness for modern formal photo-ops and ring ceremonies.

services.title: Hair Styling
services.description: Premium creative hairstyles ranging from luxury floral braids to custom sleek buns, volumizing updos, and expert texture curling.

services.title: Saree Draping
services.description: Masterful ethnic saree pre-pleating and neat customized draping in Classic Gujarati, Bengali, modern fishtail or South Indian style.
